title: Shopping Cart Flow

activities.name: addProductToCart
activities.signature: String addProductToCart(String userId, String prodId, int prodQty)
flow: Query: SELECT * FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
[YES - Partial Add] Call updateProductToCart(userId, prodId, availableQty) — cap at stock
[NO  - Full Add]  Call updateProductToCart(userId, prodId, newTotal)
[NO]  Return 'Failed to Add into Cart' (new items must go via updateProductToCart directly)

activities.name: updateProductToCart
activities.signature: String updateProductToCart(String userId, String prodId, int prodQty)
flow: Query: SELECT * FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
[YES] UPDATE usercart SET quantity=prodQty WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
[Decision] rows updated > 0? → 'Product Successfully Updated to Cart!'
[NO - qty==0] DELETE FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
[Decision] rows deleted > 0? → 'Product Successfully Updated in Cart!'
[NO]  INSERT INTO usercart VALUES(userId, prodId, prodQty)
[Decision] rows inserted > 0? → 'Product Successfully Updated to Cart!'

activities.name: removeProductFromCart
flow: Query: SELECT * FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
[YES] UPDATE usercart SET quantity=prodQuantity WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
[NO - qty <= 0] DELETE FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
[NO]  Return 'Product Not Available in the cart!'

activities.name: removeAProduct
flow: DELETE FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=? (full removal, ignores quantity)
[Decision] rows deleted > 0? → flag = true, else flag = false

activities.name: getAllCartItems
flow: Query: SELECT * FROM usercart WHERE username=?

activities.name: getCartCount
flow: Query: SELECT SUM(quantity) FROM usercart WHERE username=?
[Decision] result row present AND not null? → count = SUM value, else count = 0
Return int count (total items across all products)

activities.name: getCartItemCount
flow: [Guard] userId == null OR itemId == null? → return 0
Query: SELECT quantity FROM usercart WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
[Decision] result present AND not null? → count = quantity, else count = 0

key_decisions: addProductToCart: Is product already in cart? (drives update vs. fail path)
addProductToCart: Is requested qty + cart qty > available stock? (drives partial-add + demand registration)
updateProductToCart: Does row exist? (drives INSERT vs. UPDATE/DELETE)
updateProductToCart: Is new qty > 0 or == 0? (UPDATE vs. DELETE)
removeProductFromCart: Is product in cart? (guard check)
removeProductFromCart: After decrement, is qty > 0 or <= 0? (UPDATE vs. DELETE row)
key_relationships: addProductToCart delegates to updateProductToCart for quantity write
addProductToCart depends_on ProductServiceImpl.getProductDetails() for stock check
addProductToCart depends_on DemandServiceImpl.addProduct() for demand registration on stock shortfall
getAllCartItems returns List<CartBean> (CartBean: userId, prodId, quantity)
important_notes: addProductToCart does NOT insert new cart rows directly — only updates existing rows; new product insertion is handled inside updateProductToCart's INSERT branch
removeProductFromCart decrements by 1 per call; removeAProduct does full hard-delete regardless of quantity
Demand registration (DemandServiceImpl) is triggered only when requested quantity exceeds available stock
getCartCount returns SUM of all quantities (total items); getCartItemCount returns quantity for a specific product
